title: agalma wardii
intro: Agalma wardii, also known as Ward's Agalma, is a type of plant that belongs to the family of plants known as Aristolochiaceae. It is a medicinal plant that has been traditionally used for its various health benefits, which include treating fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions due to its analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's extracts have been found to possess antioxidant and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in herbal preparations for treating various health issues. Agalma wardii is often prepared in the form of tea or decoction, and its dried roots are also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
